name: echosphere
description: Desktop AI workspace built with Electron, Vite, and React.
author: Echosphere Team

scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.dist:publish: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --publish always
scripts.dist:win:publish: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always
scripts.dist:linux:publish: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish always
scripts.dist:mac:publish: npm run build && npm run icons:generate && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish always
